top_signals.title: Diana Shipping Inc. Announces Time Charter Contract for m/v Medusa with Aquavita
top_signals.summary: Diana Shipping Inc., a global shipping company specializing in the ownership and bareboat charter-in of dry bulk vessels, announced that, through a separate wholly-owned subsidiary, it has entered into a time charter contract with Aquavita International S.A., for one of its Kamsarmax dry bulk vessels, the m/v Medusa. top_signals.title: STEALTHGAS INC.: Insurance Issue Solved
top_signals.summary: STEALTHGAS Inc., a ship-owning company serving the liquefied petroleum gas (LPG) sector of the international shipping industry, announced that the previously reported insurance matter relating to its vessel Eco Wizard has been satisfactorily concluded with the vessel’s insurers and the agreed compensation has been received. top_signals.title: Italy Sells $6 Billion in First Dollar-Bond Sale Since 2021
top_signals.summary: Italy returned to bond market for the first time since the pandemic, broadening its pool of foreign investors after the country’s improving finances won credit-rating upgrades.

top_signals.title: ThPA S.A.: Visit of the Minister of Maritime Affairs and Insular Policy Vasilis Kikilias to the Port of Thessaloniki
top_signals.summary: The Minister of Maritime Affairs and Insular Policy, Mr. Vasilis Kikilias, visited the Port of Thessaloniki. The Minister was welcomed by the Chairwoman of the BoD of ThPA S.A., Mrs. Angeliki Samara, the Chief Executive Officer, Dr. Ioannis Tsaras and senior executives of the Company.
